# apcore-a2a

> Automatic Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol adapter for apcore — exposes apcore modules as A2A-discoverable agents with streaming, push notifications, and auth.

apcore-a2a serves apcore modules over the A2A protocol: it provides the server core, agent discovery, streaming responses, push notifications, authentication, and a client, so other agents can find and call apcore-backed capabilities.

## Start Here

- [Home](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/): What apcore-a2a does and how it exposes apcore modules over A2A.
- [Getting Started](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/getting-started/): Run an A2A server in front of your apcore modules.
- [Changelog](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/changelog/): Notable changes across releases.

## Features

- [Features Overview](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/overview/): Map of the adapter, server, streaming, and client components.
- [Adapters](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/adapters/): Adapts apcore modules into A2A agent capabilities.
- [Server Core](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/server-core/): The core A2A server runtime and request handling.
- [Streaming](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/streaming/): Streamed responses for long-running agent calls.
- [Push Notifications](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/push-notifications/): Asynchronous task updates via push notifications.
- [Auth](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/auth/): Authentication for A2A callers.
- [Client](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/client/): Client for calling A2A agents from apcore.
- [Public API](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/public-api/): The stable public surface of the adapter.
- [CLI](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/features/cli/): Command-line entry point for running the A2A server.

## Specifications

- [Product Requirements (PRD)](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/spec/prd/): Goals, scope, and requirements for the A2A adapter.
- [Technical Design](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/spec/tech-design/): Architecture and component design.
- [Software Requirements (SRS)](https://apcore-a2a.aiperceivable.com/spec/srs/): Detailed functional and non-functional requirements.

## Ecosystem

- [apcore](https://apcore.aiperceivable.com/): The core module standard exposed over A2A.
- [apcore-mcp](https://apcore-mcp.aiperceivable.com/): MCP server & OpenAI tools bridge for apcore.
- [apcore-cli](https://apcore-cli.aiperceivable.com/): Expose apcore modules as command-line tools.
- [apcore-toolkit](https://apcore-toolkit.aiperceivable.com/): Shared scanner, schema extraction, and output toolkit for adapters.
- [apflow](https://apflow.aiperceivable.com/): Orchestration layer for long-running, multi-step agent task workflows.
- [AI Perceivable (ecosystem hub)](https://aiperceivable.com/): Overview of the full ecosystem — apcore (perception), apflow (orchestration), and adapters.

## Key Facts

- Exposes apcore modules over the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol.
- Provides server core, agent discovery, streaming, push notifications, and auth.
- Includes both a server and a client.
- Part of the AI-Perceivable ecosystem alongside the MCP and CLI adapters.
- Open source. Source: https://github.com/aiperceivable/apcore-a2a
